cases.title: Portrait threshold readability
cases.goal: Confirm that the portrait push-in and the dimensional battlefield reveal feel like one intentional transition.
acceptanceCriteria: The Soldier is clearly the same man in both shots.
The transition reads as a portal or threshold, not a random cut.

cases.title: Battlefield to tank vector
cases.goal: Confirm that the Soldier's movement vector resolves naturally into the tank entry shot.
acceptanceCriteria: The tank sits on the Soldier's forward line.
The viewer can follow the directional logic into the tunnel.

cases.title: Tank to FPV conversion
cases.goal: Confirm that the older-war machine tunnel converts smoothly into a contemporary FPV trajectory.
acceptanceCriteria: The barrel exit feels like the same forward motion continuing.
No HUD or game-like interface elements appear.

cases.title: Final house recognition before impact
cases.goal: Confirm that the ending house reads as the same building from the opening and remains legible at first impact.
acceptanceCriteria: The facade geometry matches the opening image.
The house remains recognizable for at least a beat before or at impact.
